# clang trunk: assertion "idx < size()" in SmallVector during Sema check of empty attribute((target_clones()))

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173684
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, confirmed, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-01-01T19:28:54Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/ffTrhfE8Y

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer
